request.sql: SELECT id, order_id, carrier, tracking_no, status, shipped_at FROM shipments WHERE status = #{status} AND carrier = #{carrier} ORDER BY shipped_at DESC

indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_shipments_order ON public.shipments USING btree (order_id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX shipments_pkey ON public.shipments USING btree (id)

request.templateSql:
SELECT <include refid="ShipmentHarnessColumns" />
        FROM shipments
        <where>
            <if test="status != null and status != ''">
                AND status = #{status}
            </if>
            <if test="carrier != null and carrier != ''">
                AND carrier = #{carrier}
            </if>
        </where>
        ORDER BY shipped_at DESC
